message:
fix(tests): use relative paths in node_fs_shim tests for sandbox compliance

Switch all filesystem test paths from absolute /tmp/ prefixes to
relative tmp/ paths. The extension sandbox validates that file
operations stay within the workspace root; absolute /tmp/ paths
would fail the starts_with workspace check and cause test failures
after the canonicalization security fix.

Affects write_read_roundtrip_utf8, write_read_roundtrip_buffer,
exists_sync_true_after_write, exists_sync_true_for_directory,
stat_sync_file, stat_sync_directory, and mkdir_sync_creates_directory
test cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
